findings.evidence: grep: line 314 declares `noncomputable abbrev normalizerQuotientOrbitRelQuotientMulAction`; the only generic class-level formula is the perm-hom lemma at lines 305-311, while the smul formula exists only for the deck specialization at lines 151-161.
findings.fix: Make this an opaque `noncomputable def` and add a generic `@[simp]` representative smul lemma for `Subgroup.normalizerQuotientMk H g` acting on `Quotient.mk'' x`, parallel to the deck-specialized lemma.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientOrbitRelQuotientMulAction` is a public `abbrev`, so consumers can unfold the `MulAction.compHom` implementation for the generic normalizer-quotient action.

summary: One public action constructor still exposes its implementation body instead of presenting an opaque interface characterized by lemmas.
